name: STANDARDS-URLS: validator rejects duplicate keys (yaml parser is strict)
setup:
printf 'src-1:
  publisher: A
  url: https://a.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
src-1:
  publisher: B
  url: https://b.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
